001package net.okocraft.box.api.model.manager;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.api.model.item.BoxCustomItem;
004import net.okocraft.box.api.model.item.BoxItem;
005import org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack;
006import org.jetbrains.annotations.ApiStatus;
007import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
008import org.jetbrains.annotations.Unmodifiable;
009
010import java.util.Collection;
011import java.util.Optional;
012import java.util.Set;
013import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
014
015/**
016 * An interface to manage {@link BoxItem}s.
017 */
018public interface ItemManager {
019
020    /**
021     * Gets the {@link BoxItem} of the specified item if it exists.
022     *
023     * @param itemStack the item to get
024     * @return the optional {@link BoxItem}
025     */
026    @NotNull Optional<BoxItem> getBoxItem(@NotNull ItemStack itemStack);
027
028    /**
029     * Gets the {@link BoxItem} of the specified name if it exists.
030     *
031     * @param name the item name to get
032     * @return the optional {@link BoxItem}
033     */
034    @NotNull Optional<BoxItem> getBoxItem(@NotNull String name);
035
036    /**
037     * Gets the {@link BoxItem} of the specified id if it exists.
038     *
039     * @param id the id to get
040     * @return the optional {@link BoxItem}
041     */
042    @NotNull Optional<BoxItem> getBoxItem(int id);
043
044    /**
045     * Checks if the specified item has already been registered.
046     *
047     * @param itemStack the item to check
048     * @return {@code true} if registered, {@code false} otherwise
049     */
050    boolean isRegistered(@NotNull ItemStack itemStack);
051
052    /**
053     * Checks if the specified name has already been used.
054     *
055     * @param name the name to check
056     * @return {@code true} if used, {@code false} otherwise
057     */
058    boolean isUsedName(@NotNull String name);
059
060    /**
061     * Checks if the specified name has already been used.
062     *
063     * @param name the name to check
064     * @return {@code true} if used, {@code false} otherwise
065     * @deprecated use {@link #isUsedName(String)}
066     */
067    @Deprecated(forRemoval = true)
068    @ApiStatus.ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion = "4.2.0")
069    default boolean isUsed(@NotNull String name) {
070        return isUsedName(name);
071    }
072
073    /**
074     * Checks if the specified item is a custom item created by box itself.
075     *
076     * @param item  the item to check
077     * @return {@code true} if the item is a custom item, {@code false} otherwise
078     */
079    boolean isCustomItem(@NotNull BoxItem item);
080
081    /**
082     * Registers item.
083     * <p>
084     * It will throw an exception in {@link CompletableFuture}
085     * if the item is already registered or fails to save to a file or database.
086     *
087     * @param original the item to register
088     * @return the {@link CompletableFuture} to register item
089     */
090    @NotNull CompletableFuture<@NotNull BoxCustomItem> registerCustomItem(@NotNull ItemStack original);
091
092    /**
093     * Rename the custom item.
094     *
095     * @param item    the custom item to rename
096     * @param newName the new name
097     * @return the {@link CompletableFuture} to rename an item
098     */
099    @NotNull CompletableFuture<@NotNull BoxCustomItem> renameCustomItem(@NotNull BoxCustomItem item,
100                                                                        @NotNull String newName);
101
102    /**
103     * Gets the item name set.
104     * <p>
105     * Returns set is a collection of {@link BoxItem#getPlainName()}.
106     *
107     * @return the set of {@link BoxItem#getPlainName()}
108     */
109    @NotNull @Unmodifiable Set<String> getItemNameSet();
110
111    /**
112     * Gets all {@link BoxItem}s.
113     *
114     * @return the set of all {@link BoxItem}s
115     */
116    @NotNull @Unmodifiable Collection<BoxItem> getBoxItemSet();
117}
